ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or title of the ticket */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the ticket */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the ticket */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the priority level of the ticket */,
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the milestone associated with the ticket */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component related to the ticket */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the ticket */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the ticket */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the ticket was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the ticket was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_milestone_id FOREIGN KEY ("milestone_id") REFERENCES milestones ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES ticket_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the milestone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ticket type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ticket type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket associated with the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket associated with the attachment */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path for the attachment */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., status update, priority change) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket associated with the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., milestone approaching, deadline near) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the integrated tool */,
  "tool_url" TEXT /* URL of the integrated tool */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the integrated tool */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the integrated tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
